In the old days, if a woman had a husband who was angry and volatile she would handle it by being submissive, keeping the peace, and guiding the kids to behave so they didn't anger him.

The modern feminist approach to having a husband with anger issues is to divorce him and leave the kids to navigate his volatility on their own during visitation.

A painterly fantasy scene depicts a tiny smiling gnome standing knee-deep in fresh snow within an enchanted pumpkin patch. The gnome has fluffy white hair, rosy cheeks, pointed ears, and a tall navy-blue hat decorated with curled vine-like tips and warm red bands. One eye is playfully closed in a wink while both hands gently embrace a glowing orange pumpkin dusted with snow. Larger pumpkins fill the foreground and background, each connected by twisting black vines that curl into elegant spirals above the snow. Soft snowflakes drift through the air, catching warm golden light spilling from a cozy cottage tucked among towering trees in the distance. The cottage windows glow invitingly against the cool blue winter landscape, creating a beautiful contrast between icy surroundings and comforting warmth. Loose impressionistic brushstrokes blend cool blues, whites, and warm oranges into a dreamy storybook atmosphere filled with charm, whimsy, and quiet holiday magic.

A luminous fantasy portrait shows a winged woman standing confidently against a soft gray studio background as a flurry of fine snow or frost drifts through the air. She faces forward with her chin slightly raised and her eyes gently closed, creating an expression of calm confidence and icy serenity. Large white feathered wings extend behind her shoulders, their layered feathers catching soft studio light. Her long blonde hair flows freely around her face and neck as if lifted by a gentle winter breeze. She wears an elaborate ivory gown made from textured floral lace and delicate translucent fabric, sculpted to resemble frost-covered blossoms and frozen petals. The fitted bodice features deep floral detailing, while flowing fabric wraps around her hips and legs with graceful movement. Her hands rest firmly on her hips, giving the composition a statuesque, regal presence. Bright highlights illuminate her skin and the feathers of the wings, contrasting with subtle shadows that add depth and realism. Snow-like particles fill the foreground and background, reinforcing the impression that she has emerged from the heart of a frozen storm while remaining untouched by the cold.
